doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: The cited EEOC “Compliance Manual, Section 8” and its 2018 framing do not match a real official EEOC publication, though it borrows some genuine ADEA principles.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: The EEOC does not issue a “Section 8: Age Discrimination, Effective February 2018” compliance manual in this form, and the wording mixes real ADEA concepts with invented, overly specific guidance.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: The cited EEOC “Compliance Manual, Section 8” and its 2018 framing do not match a real official EEOC publication, though it borrows some genuine ADEA principles.
